1.name: Hardwood sword
1.description:
It's said that the hero also began his
journey from the starting village with a wooden sword
This has become a goal for many adventurers to emulate
1.ability: Deals extra damage when the weapon nears breaking
2.name: Hardwood stick
2.description:
A great shape sturdy wooden stick 
perfect for kids,It’s also decent as a weapon
2.ability: Deals extra damage when the weapon nears breaking
3.name: Lumber Axe
3.description:
A reliable companion for adventurers or pioneers exploring
forests. However, as it’s not designed for combat,
don’t rely on it too much in battle
4.name: Clenched Fist
4.description:
No weapon equipped? Then just unleash a flurry of punches!
It may be a quick fix, but a fist full of spirit packs a serious punch
Why use a weapon when your fists can do the job?
4.ability: Punch damage scales with max HP!
5.name: Knight's sword
5.description:
A weapon used by father in his youth,
well-maintained and seemingly issued to court knights
5.ability: When HP<\c[10]30%\c[0], this weapon's attack doubles
6.name: Lava Staff
6.description:
A wand made from volcanic minerals,easily
concentrates fire elements However, a slight mistake
can cause it to explode, engulfing the user
6.ability: Hold right mouse button to cast \c[27]Crimson Lotus Meteor\c[0]
7.name: Ice Staff
7.description:
A wand made from magic crystals, unleashes wide-range
frost. Very hard to control.Feels like it’s freezing my hand
7.ability: Hold right mouse button to cast \c[27]Frozen Spell\c[0]
8.name: Weird Feather
8.description:
A feather from a weird bird. Extremely light and can
easily generate enough force to blow someone away
8.ability:
Movement speed increases when using Whirlwind Slash
Enters a float state immune to falling after spin speed increases
9.name: Knight's sword
9.description:
Weapons assigned to the palace knights
They symbolize the path of protection for the knights
9.ability: When HP<\c[10]30%\c[0], this weapon's attack doubles
10.name: Silver Greatsword
10.description:
A greatsword, seemingly forged from silver,
radiating a dazzling glow. Its surface shines cold and hard,
though its true material remains unknown
10.ability: When HP falls below \c[29]400\c[0], the weapon’s full potential is limited!
11.name: Heavy Mallet
11.description:
A bulky wooden hammer
Getting hit on the head is sure to leave you dizzy!
11.ability:
33% chance to inflict Stun state on attack
When HP falls below \c[29]400\c[0], the weapon’s full potential is limited!
12.name: Baseball Bat
12.description:
A metal club. It’s said to be used for sports, 
but it’s also great for whacking people.
12.ability:
Durability Boost!
Reflected projectiles move faster and deal more damage
13.name: Rotten Fishbone
13.subtitle: "It's too smelly, throw it away!"
13.description:
Leftover bones from a large fish, with rotting meat
still clinging to them, emitting an unbearable stench
13.ability:
66% chance to inflict Poison state on attack
Gives off a stench so foul, even monsters flee!
14.name: Giant Crab Claw
14.description:
A massive crab claw that clamps on tight and won’t let go
Once it latches onto something, good luck getting it off
14.ability:
When thrown, it clamps to the target, dealing constant damage
Cannot be retrieved unless the target dies
15.name: Frostmoon
15.subtitle:
"Licked the blade and got my tongue stuck… So cold, so painful!"
"\str[121], don't lick random stuff!"
15.description: A magic sword made of ice, just near it sends a chilling cold
15.ability: 50% chance to inflict Freeze state on attack
16.name: Leaky Electric Sword
16.subtitle: "Zap... zap...!"
16.description:
A cursed sword filled with wild energy, but it's still faulty
Be careful—it might shock the user as well
16.ability: 50% chance to inflict Lightning state on attack
17.name: Sunflare
17.subtitle: "\str[121], it looks scary, please don't hold it."
17.description:
A magic sword that has absorbed solar energy over time
It seems particularly effective against certain monsters
17.ability: 40% chance to inflict Burn state on attack
18.name: Orc Bone Axe
18.description:
A large axe made from the bones of defeated foes. Not
very sharp, and orcs often prefer to throw it rather than
use it in close combat
18.ability: Deals extra damage when the weapon is thrown
19.name: Nichirin
19.description:
A replica forged in imitation of the forbidden blazing demon
sword from myth. Naturally, it cannot summon the earth-scorching 
hellfire like the true original.
19.ability: May summon a meteor to strike a random location when attacking
20.name: Rusty Iron Sword
20.description:
An old iron sword covered in rust, long since lost its sharpness
From another perspective, the corrosion itself is dangerously lethal...
20.ability:
15% chance to inflict Poison state on attack
Always inflicts Poison on bleeding targets
21.name: From Hell
21.subtitle: "This thing thirsts for blood..."
21.description:
One of the weapons used by a notorious serial killer,
it's covered in blood
21.ability: 45% chance to inflict Bleeding state on attack
22.name: Forging Hammer
22.description:
A heavy hammer once used by blacksmiths to forge metal
Now held in someone’s hand and used for all sorts of odd purposes
22.ability:
Striking a weapon placed on the anvil repairs it
Unequipping this hammer also dispels the summoned anvil
25.name: Tidewyrm’s Song
25.description:
A staff crafted from damp magic crystals, always dripping wet
It only reveals its true power when using water as a medium
quite inconvenient!
25.ability:
Casting near water enhances magic
Hold right mouse button to cast Ripple Thrust
24.name: Storm Orc Axe
24.description:
A greataxe wielded by an orc attuned to nature’s power.
Each swing tears the earth and sends gales howling with the blade
24.ability:
Has a chance to unleash a burst of wind when attacking
When HP falls below \c[29]400\c[0], the weapon’s full potential is limited!
26.name: Starlit Night
26.description:
A staff adorned with gemstones that sparkle like the Milky
Way. It has the power to create a strong gravitational field,
pulling intruders into the depths of darkness
26.ability: Hold right mouse button to cast Black Hole
27.name: Toxic Spore Blade
27.description:
A slim sword dropped by Walking Mushrooms. Its dull blade
is coated with toxic spores, guaranteeing poison on every strike
Though low in durability, its toxins make it highly effective
27.ability: Attacks have a 50% chance to inflict Poison status
29.name: Pest Bane Staff
29.description:
A special staff modified by an alchemist long tormented
by pests. It can instantly generate a toxic gas to kill
small creatures, and is said to also deodorize and disinfect
29.ability: Hold left mouse button to cast Extermination Magic
30.name: Kanesada
30.description:
A beloved Katana that accompanied a girl striving for
swordsmanship's peak—never leaving her grasp, even in sleep
Whether sharp or not, it remains a witness to her journey
30.ability: Greatly enhances the effects of all learned skills
35.name: Claíomh Solais
35.subtitle: "Huh? I can't see anything! This isn't a sword hilt!?"
35.description:
Blessed by light, the blade bends light, becoming an invisible sword
This makes it razor-sharp, and when needed, its radiance unleashes
35.ability: Attacks completely ignore the target's defense
36.name: Tyrfing
36.description:
A man-made magic sword with a blade forged from mana crystals
Each slash unleashes a tangible sword wave. For skilled swordsmen,
it’s a weapon that greatly enhances their power
36.ability: Attacks generate sword waves that deal damage
40.name: Anti-Bullying Hammer
40.subtitle: "NO BULLYING!!"
40.description:
A weapon born to punish evil adventurers. 
Though just a toy hammer, getting bonked still hurts.
40.ability:
Deals recoil damage when used for evil deeds
The lower your Sin value, the higher its damage
42.name: Den’s Hand Scythe
42.subtitle: "Remember this, Whirlwind Slash is used like this! "
42.description:
A short-handled scythe carried by an outsider with a fearsome
design and a will dwelling within. Wielding it too long
may cause strange voices to echo in your mind
42.ability:
Automatically returns to hand after being thrown and hitting
When catching the returning weapon, can throw it again
51.name: Mixed Flavor Popsicle
51.description:
A edible weapon crafted with care by Kanban Musume of the NLCH
A tri-flavored popsicle combining chocolate, cream, and strawberry
Refreshing and delicious! But be sure to finish it before it melts...
51.ability:
Might get eaten when attacking...
Melts and disappears over time when equipped...
52.name: Unit 2
52.description:
A communication device bought from a suspicious shop
Just shout 'Fire!' and you'll receive sniper support from
somewhere. But, you have to pay phone bill yourself
52.ability:
Left-click to call support fire, 1000 yen per use
Right-click to call a long-range snipe, 500 yen per use
53.name: Cone Greatsword
53.description:
A edible weapon crafted with care by Kanban Musume of the NLCH
While keeping its weapon performance, it's also delicious!
53.ability:
Might get eaten when attacking...
Melts and disappears over time when equipped...
54.name: Carrot Greatsword
54.description:
A top-grade carrot secretly cultivated by the Maid Bunny
Infused with the power of stone, it overgrew into a delicacy 
so tempting it could make a Maid Bunny cry with desire
54.ability:
Might get eaten when attacking...
When thrown, it pierces and hits all units in its path
55.name: Frozen Carrot Greatsword
55.description:
A top-grade carrot secretly cultivated by the Maid Bunny
After being frozen, it’s rock-hard and impossible to bite into
Rumor has it this was the maid bunny’s winter stash
55.ability:
40% chance to inflict Freeze state on attack
When thrown, it pierces and hits all units in its path
56.name: Moldy Carrot Greatsword
56.description:
A top-grade carrot secretly cultivated by the Maid Bunny
Stored for too long, it’s now moldy and rotten...
no longer edible—the maid bunny keeps it to drive away enemies
56.ability:
40% chance to inflict Poison state on attack
When thrown, it pierces and hits all units in its path
57.name: Carrot?
57.description:
A top-grade carr...
Huh? Is this really… a carrot!?
57.ability: When thrown, it pierces and hits all units in its path
60.name: Banana?
60.subtitle: "Is this really a banana...?"
60.description: A peeled banana that must be held carefully
60.ability: At high speeds, it’s easy to fling the banana away... Eek!?
61.name: Giant Snail Vacuum
61.description:
A vacuum made from a giant snail's shell
Modified airflow for powerful suction
61.ability: Hold mouse to pull objects closer
62.name: Ancient Tree Remnant
62.description:
A bizarre branch weapon, obtained from an ancient tree trunk,
hard yet brimming with vitality and still growing
62.ability:
Defeating enemies auto-repairs weapon durability
Excess durability grants +1 ATK per 1% above max
63.name: Parasitic Blade
63.description:
A sword consumed by a tree over centuries, where metal and
life fused into mysterious harmony. Its blade pulses like
it’s breathing, radiating a strange warmth to the wielder
63.ability: Restores \c[29]${Math.floor(1.2*$gameParty.leader().paramPlus(2))}\c[0] HP to the wielder upon defeating an enemy
66.name: Pillar of Ritual
66.subtitle: "——most adventurers just call this thing the Deer Pipe."
66.description:
A weapon commonly used by the Lust Demon, said to have 
originally been some kind of ritual implement.
Its material and inner magic remain impossible to analyze.
It also works surprisingly well as an alarm clock…!
66.ability: At the top of each hour, gain a blessing that boosts all stats
70.name: Ancient Glory
70.subtitle: "Unleash the Golden Power ⬆⬆⬇⬇⬅⮕⬅⮕"
70.description:
A dazzling golden demon sword, one of the treasures of 
the World Administrator. That man once wielded it, 
battling in the Abyss for three days and nights without rest
70.ability: Unleashes its power when a secret command is entered
80.name: Willow Leaf Greatsword
80.description:
"Pluck leaves, scatter flowers, wound your foes"
A very sharp greatsword shaped like willow leaves
80.ability: Has a chance to fire willow leaf shurikens when attacking
81.name: Infested Blade
81.subtitle: "Ugh, the slime is still wriggling... So gross!!"
81.description:
A greatsword infested with resilient, life-hungry slime
Its craving for vitality makes the slime fiercely aggressive
81.ability:
Deals extra damage to Bleeding enemies
Drains blood if the target dies while Bleeding
82.name: Hercules's Broken Horn
82.description:
A sword forged from the sturdy horn of a rhinoceros beetle
Though once broken in fierce battle, its hardness remains genuine
Because of that, it became extremely durable when reforged
82.ability:
The lower the damage, the less durability is consumed
No durability is consumed if damage is ${QJ.MPMZ.tl.herculesBrokenHornEffectProcess()} or below
101.name: Hardwood Bow
101.description:
A longbow made of Hardwood
It can shoot arrows, but its performance is very average
101.ability:
Hold right-click to charge and release a \c[27]Piercing Arrow\c[0]
Piercing Arrow lose damage per target pierced
102.name: Hunter's Bow
102.description:
A composite longbow that reduces draw strength
Less damage, but easier rapid fire
102.ability:
+Attack Speed, -20% Damage, -20% Durability Loss
Hold right-click to charge and release a \c[27]Piercing Arrow\c[0]
103.name: Sunset Cloud
103.description:
A magical bow filled with fire energy
Not only burns enemies, but also fires explosive arrows
103.ability:
Hold right-click to charge and release a \c[27]Explosive Arrow\c[0]
Explosive Arrow explode on hit
104.name: Snow Watch
104.description:
A magical bow covered in ice. Shoots ice arrows
and can freeze a wide area with a charged shot
104.ability:
Hold right-click to charge and release a \c[27]Icebound Arrow\c[0]
Icebound Arrow freeze targets on hit
105.name: Chidori
105.description:
A golden bow capable of summoning thunder,
named for its buzzing sound reminiscent of lightning
However, be careful—it’s highly conductive
105.ability: Hold right-click to charge and release a \c[27]Thunder Arrow\c[0]
106.name: Hellhound Cursed Bow
106.description:
A product of the Abyss, this oddly shaped bow can
fire multiple arrows simultaneously. However,
this eerie magic bow remains sealed, with its true power unreleased
106.ability: Hold right-click to charge and release a \c[27]Piercing Arrow\c[0]
107.name: Blood Hunt
107.description:
A blood-stained longbow.
Each draw leaves the string wet with its wielder’s own blood,
until the arrow returns with a sweeter offering
107.ability:
Hold right-click to charge and release a \c[27]Blood Piercing Arrow\c[0]
Consumes HP to empower shots. Killing arrows drain blood
250.name: Hellstone Pickaxe
250.description:
An exotic pickaxe processed and forged from Hellstone Ingots
With its astonishing hardness and the mana entwined around it,
it can shatter most objects in the world with a single strike
250.ability: Greatly increases damage dealt to destructible entities
251.name: Hellstone Shovel
251.description:
An exotic shovel processed and forged from Hellstone Ingots
With its astonishing hardness and the mana entwined around it,
even solid ground will be forcibly torn apart beneath it
251.ability: Can break through terrain, creating a passage to lower layers
